title: Chytraculia lucida
taxonomy: Chytraculia lucida belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a species of flowering plant. Chytraculia lucida is native to South Africa. The plant is a shrub with yellow flowers and has a variable leaf shape. Chytraculia lucida is also known by the synonym Senecio lucidus.
uses: Chytraculia lucida is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal uses.
